summary: Maeda has explicitly pivoted to a bullish stance in his most recent video, declaring that the market bottom is in and anticipating higher prices for Bitcoin.
narrative: He argues that the market is currently bottoming, citing STRC as a potential leverage mechanism to propel BTC upward while critiquing common 4-Year Cycle theories. This marks a significant shift from his previous bearish strategy of shorting Ethereum, as he now suggests the downside has been flushed out and the next major move is upward.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
